CareLink · health intent

health · NetIQ-powered

CareLink

A telehealth patient app. Patients sign in through their carrier; consults check network quality first, and prescriptions match identity to the SIM's KYC.

  • check_circleSign-in is gated by a real NetIQ onboarding decision — SIM swap, device, reachability checks against the carrier.
  • check_circleEach in-app action calls the same /decision/run with a sector-specific intent.
  • check_circleMemory persists across all four apps — sign in here, switch demos, NetIQ remembers.
9:41
network_cellwifibattery_full
stethoscope

CareLink

Talk to a doctor in 60 seconds. Prescriptions filled and verified before pickup.

  • boltSame-day video consults from GHS 25
  • local_pharmacyPrescriptions delivered to your block
  • verified_userIdentity verified by your carrier

By continuing you agree to CareLink’s terms and privacy policy.
